target.title: chore(plugin-sdk): refresh API baseline hash
target.body:
## Summary
- Regenerate the Plugin SDK API baseline hash for current main.
- Keep the change limited to docs/.generated/plugin-sdk-api-baseline.sha256.

## Source
- ClawSweeper finding for openclaw/openclaw@4eba70b532f8b54c6cceac20c407526c9ea9121d.
- Original commit context from @vincentkoc.

## Validation
- pnpm plugin-sdk:api:check
- pnpm check:changed
